sn56.55:1.1: "Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, puriso mahāpathaviyā satta kolaṭṭhimattiyo guḷikā upanikkhipeyya. Taṁ kiṁ maññatha, bhikkhave, katamaṁ nu kho bahutaraṁ – yā vā satta kolaṭṭhimattiyo guḷikā upanikkhittā, ayaṁ vā mahāpathavī"ti?
sn56.55:1.2: "Etadeva, bhante, bahutaraṁ, yadidaṁ – mahāpathavī; appamattikā satta kolaṭṭhimattiyo guḷikā upanikkhittā. Saṅkhampi na upenti, upanidhampi na upenti, kalabhāgampi na upenti mahāpathaviṁ upanidhāya satta kolaṭṭhimattiyo guḷikā upanikkhittā"ti.
sn56.55:1.3:
"Evameva kho, bhikkhave, ariyasāvakassa … pe … yogo karaṇīyo"ti.
Pañcamaṁ.
